vignette: A weekend morning in Ingleby Arncliffe often begins with a walk along the Coast to Coast Walk, which passes directly through the area. Afterwards, residents can stop for a coffee at The Joiners Shop or pick up everyday essentials from the nearby Londis. Those looking to extend their route might head towards the Cleveland Way or explore the paths through Swinegar Plantation. The morning typically concludes with a quiet lunch at The Blue Bell Inn.
